license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bybbpsin
title: 6M GITC
author: Jacquelina.Woods

steps_raw.instruction: Aseptically mix 7.09 g Guanidine Isothiocyanate Thermo Fisher Catalog #15535016 in sterile distilled or ultrapure water to 4.5 mL
Bring total volume up to 10 mL with additional sterile distilled or ultrapure water
Store at Room temperature in the dark (or in light occluding tube) Solution is only stable for 1 month after preparation.
